response.overview: On my anniversary, my sister killed me to steal my life. Reborn, I watched her snatch the wealthy heir I married in my past life, leaving me with the penniless nobody. Fine by me. Little did she know, the man she threw away is actually the most feared Mafia Don in the city! While she suffers in a toxic marriage, I'm being pampered by the King of the Underworld. Who's the real winner now? 💍🔥🔫
response.title: Sister Stole The Rich Fiance
